basics.name: Anirudh Sharma
basics.title: Project Manager
basics.summary: Results-driven Project Manager with 5+ years of experience leading Generative AI, Automation, SaaS, and Cloud transformation projects across healthcare, aviation, and government sectors. Skilled in managing cross-functional teams of up to 18, achieving a 95% on-time delivery rate. Expertise includes Agile methodologies, Scrum, and Earned Value Management (EVM), boosting delivery velocity by 25% and reducing operational effort by 60%. Proven track record in stakeholder engagement, risk mitigation, and deploying innovative AI solutions, such as multi-million dollar revenue forecasting systems. Dedicated to leveraging data-driven decision-making to optimize project outcomes and drive business value.

certifications: Talking to AI: Prompt Engineering for Project Managers
Practical Application of Generative AI for Project Managers

bullets: Directed the delivery of AI, automation, and cloud transformation programs for US government agencies and healthcare enterprises, aligning projects with strategic business objectives.
Delivered 6+ enterprise AI and automation projects with budgets exceeding $1M+, achieving a 95% on-time delivery rate through effective Agile governance.
Managed cross-functional teams of 12–15 members, including engineers, AI specialists, and designers, boosting sprint velocity by 25% and enhancing release predictability.
Implemented Earned Value Management (EVM) metrics to monitor project health, maintaining Schedule Performance Index (SPI) > 1.05 and Cost Performance Index (CPI) > 1.1.
Reduced delivery variance by 18% using predictive forecasting techniques (EAC & VAC) to enhance project predictability.
Initiated Agile transformation initiatives, coaching teams to improve Scrum adoption and increase overall delivery efficiency by 20%.
Oversaw the complete Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), including scope definition, backlog prioritization, sprint planning, release management, and production rollout.
Served as the primary executive interface for client stakeholders, ensuring technology solutions met strategic business needs.
Proactively identified delivery risks, implementing mitigation strategies to prevent potential schedule overruns of up to 30%.
Owned product strategy and delivery for enterprise digital platforms, overseeing cross-functional product development teams to ensure alignment and efficiency.
Managed end-to-end product delivery for Prakya 360, enhancing customer workflow automation and achieving a 40% reduction in manual operational efforts.
Successfully launched the Good Green Marketplace by coordinating efforts of engineering, design, and marketing teams, delivering the platform two months ahead of schedule.
Established a data-driven approach to backlog prioritization, resulting in a 30% improvement in product release efficiency.
Facilitated stakeholder workshops to convert business requirements into clear user stories and acceptance criteria, reducing requirement ambiguity and rework by 20%.
Enhanced cross-team collaboration and conflict resolution to maintain consistent sprint delivery commitments.
Managed Agile delivery for e-commerce and enterprise SaaS applications, while working as Product Owner for internal solutions.
Drove Agile ceremonies, including Sprint Planning, Backlog Grooming, Daily Stand-ups, Sprint Reviews, and Retrospectives, ensuring cohesive team dynamics and effective project execution.
Delivered the internal product Fabpik, enhancing digital commerce operations and driving scalable product growth.
Translated complex business requirements into clear, actionable technical user stories, resulting in a 25% reduction in development rework.
Coordinated with engineering and QA teams to uphold high release quality, achieving an 18% decrease in defect leakage.
Attained high sales with a average DRPS of ₹50,000.
Consistently surpassed revenue targets, significantly contributing to regional revenue growth initiatives.
Mentored and trained new associates on best practices in customer engagement and sales strategies.
Built strong relationships with clients, enhancing customer satisfaction and driving repeat business.

projects.title: CARA – Clinical Assistant
bullets: Orchestrated an Agile team to develop CARA, a Generative AI clinical documentation assistant for Hanger Clinic, enhancing clinician-patient interactions.
Integrated Microsoft's Speech-to-text to convert conversations into structured SOAP medical notes, streamlining workflow for healthcare providers.
Utilized Microsoft Azure OpenAI and .NET to design a platform that analyzes historical encounters and extracts prosthetic measurement data efficiently.
Accomplished a 50% reduction in clinician documentation effort, significantly decreasing the volume of manual paperwork required.
Increased clinical documentation speed by 40%, enabling healthcare professionals to allocate more time for patient care.
Automated the capture of prosthetic measurements, reducing manual form-filling errors by 35%, enhancing accuracy in patient records.
Accelerated patient record processing, leading to improved data accessibility and informed clinical decision-making.

projects.title: Revenue Forecasting
bullets: Led Agile delivery of a machine learning revenue forecasting system for Hanger Clinic, enhancing predictive capabilities.
A solution capable of predicting revenue from WIP and Non-WIP orders utilizing historical financial data patterns.
Clocked approximately 95% accuracy in revenue predictions, supporting reliable financial planning and resource allocation.
Empowered leadership teams with data-driven budgeting decisions through advanced predictive analytics.
Lowered manual financial forecasting efforts by 60%, streamlining the financial planning process.
Deployed interactive Power BI dashboards, significantly improving financial visibility across departments.
Utilized Python and machine learning methodologies to enhance system performance and efficiency.

projects.title: Spirit Copilot Agent
bullets: Spearheaded the delivery of an AI-powered Copilot chatbot for Spirit Airlines, significantly enhancing customer interaction for flight bookings.
Executed intelligent algorithms to assist users in discovering optimal flight routes and identifying cheaper fares.
Contributed to a 20-25% increase in potential booking conversion rates through targeted flight recommendations.
Decreased dependency on customer support by 30%, enhancing operational efficiency with systematized responses to booking inquiries.
Improved digital self-service capabilities, greatly enhancing the overall customer booking experience and engagement.

projects.title: NYCDEP – IDR Asbestos Inspection Management Platform
bullets: "NYCDEP – IDR Asbestos Inspection Management Platform" was developed for the New York City Department of Environmental Protection.
Utilized Microsoft Power Apps and Power Platform to create a robust digital solution for Inspector Daily Reports (IDR) focused on asbestos monitoring.
Digitized inspection workflows, achieving a significant reduction in manual paperwork by 70%, thereby enhancing operational efficiency.
Improved accuracy of inspection reporting and ensured compliance with stringent NYC asbestos regulations.
Streamlined the inspection report processing time, resulting in a 50% decrease in turnaround.
Facilitated centralized monitoring of inspection activities and approvals, enhancing oversight and accountability.

projects.title: CII IGBC – Green Building Certification Platform
bullets: A digital certification platform made for the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) aimed at streamlining the green building certification lifecycle for the Indian Green Building Council (IGBC)
Utilized PHP Laravel and AngularJS technologies to automate processes previously reliant on manual emails and documentation
Improved operational efficiency of the certification process by 60%, significantly improving overall workflow
Eliminated manual payment tracking, paperwork, and email workflows, leading to smoother operations
Achieved a 40% reduction in certification processing time, facilitating quicker approvals
Increased transparency and scalability of the certification process, supporting sustainable building initiatives in India

projects.title: Positive Homeopathy – Electronic Health Record (EHR) Platform
bullets: Upgraded the Positive Homeopathy Electronic Health Record (EHR) Platform to streamline clinic management and enhance patient management workflows.
Computerized key processes including appointments, prescriptions, medical records, and billing, significantly improving operational efficiency.
Realised a 55% reduction in administrative workload for clinic staff, allowing for a more focused approach to patient care.
Optimized doctor productivity by 30% by providing instant access to patient records and improving workflow efficiency.
Digitized historical patient data, facilitating quicker clinical decision-making and enhancing patient care outcomes.
Streamlined appointment scheduling and payment processing, optimizing the overall patient experience and clinic operations.

projects.title: National Health Mission – Child Health Monitoring Mobile Application
bullets: Developed a mobile healthcare application for the Daman and Diu Government to enhance child health monitoring.
Utilized React Native and PHP to create a user-friendly interface for doctors and Anganwadi workers.
Enabled real-time tracking of children's health conditions across multiple regions, facilitating timely interventions.
Improved early identification of health risks and nutritional deficiencies among children.
Eliminated manual data recording by 50%, significantly increasing efficiency for healthcare workers.
Boosted coordination between healthcare professionals, leading to more proactive healthcare decisions.

projects.title: CII Solar Rooftop – Green Solar Certification SaaS Platform
bullets: "CII Solar Rooftop – Green Solar Certification SaaS Platform" was built for the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) to automate the certification process for solar rooftop manufacturers.
Made a 60% reduction in manual certification paperwork, streamlining operations and enhancing productivity.
Amplified certification processing efficiency by 50%, significantly accelerating the overall certification cycle time for manufacturers.
Facilitated scalable certification management across multiple companies, promoting the adoption of green energy solutions.

education.degree: B.Tech/B.E. - Bachelor of Technology / Engineering | Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering
education.school: J.B. Institute of Engineering & Technology, Hyderabad

achievements.context: On-time delivery rate for 6+ enterprise AI and automation projects with budgets exceeding $1M+.
Reduction in operational effort and manual financial forecasting efforts.
Reduction in clinician documentation effort and inspection report processing time.
Reduction in manual operational efforts for Prakya 360 and certification processing time.
Improvement in product release efficiency and optimization of doctor productivity.
Boost in sprint velocity and reduction in development rework.
Increase in overall delivery efficiency and potential booking conversion rates.
Reduction in delivery variance and decrease in defect leakage.
